title: Create durable advanced program packets for AMP37 through AMP47
persona: Operations leader with cross-functional review access
steps: Open each AMP37-AMP47 workspace from the Assistant subnav.
Review source signals, risk assessment, recommendations, artifact, approval route, and rollback plan.
Click Create AMP packet on each workspace.
expected: Each workspace persists an AssistantAdvancedProgramPacket row with ampNumber, programKey, sourceSummaryJson, assessmentJson, recommendationJson, approvalPlanJson, artifactJson, rollbackPlanJson, and leadershipSummary.
Each AMP uses distinct program copy, source metrics, risk rules, recommendations, approval owners, artifact label, and no-mutation guardrails.
An AssistantAuditEvent records packet creation for each AMP.
No downstream product, supplier, inventory, shipment, compliance, finance, facility, packaging, manufacturing, schedule, sourcing, RFQ, PO, or customer-promise records are mutated automatically.

title: Queue human review for AMP37 through AMP47 packets
steps: Create or select a DRAFT advanced program packet.
Add a review note describing the intended downstream decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with an AMP-specific actionKind such as assistant_amp37_review or assistant_amp47_review.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that the AMP-specific downstream records were not changed automatically.

title: Advanced program artifact and rollback guardrails remain visible
steps: Open an AMP37-AMP47 packet with active risk signals.
Inspect the artifact, recommendations, approval plan, and rollback plan.
Queue review without executing downstream changes.
expected: artifactJson identifies the program-specific packet, export-ready sections, and no-mutation scope.
recommendationJson includes human-review guardrails before any operational execution.
rollbackPlanJson preserves underlying operational records and instructs users to create a fresh packet when source evidence materially changes.
